css: .hp-brand-hero { padding: 16px 18px; border: 1px solid var(--hp-border); border-left: 4px solid var(--hp-primary); border-radius: var(--hp-radius); background: var(--hp-surface); } .hp-brand-hero h2 { margin: 2px 0 4px; color: var(--hp-text); font-size: 19px; } .hp-brand-hero p { margin: 0; color: #526573; } .hp-brand-kicker { color: var(--hp-primary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.2px; }
